center.name: 圣马蒂亚斯湾
center.summary: 圣马蒂亚斯湾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白头船鸭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: However it is now known to have a larger range from the southern portion of the San Matías Gulf to Islote Chato. The crucial populations for this species are found in Bahía San Gregorio (Argentina) [1], Bahía Melo [2], and Caleta Malaspina[3]. These three crucial populations are all located in the San Jorge Gulf
